name: sanr_baseline
description: Cache-enabled SANR workflow for repeated-workload cache analysis and figure generation. This is not the paper-grade routing-only workflow.

workflow_semantics.cache_mode_note: Default SANR workflow uses caching and should not be conflated with cache-disabled paper-grade runs.
workflow_semantics.workload_repeat_note: Each source row is repeated consecutively; output length equals source_length * repeat_factor.

lineage_requirements: run_manifest.json with git commit and input hashes
workload_repeat_stats.json with coverage and diversity checks
